## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has published 334 articles for Firework since August 2024, generating 250k impressions and 1200 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Focus shifting to enterprise-targeted content and lead generation rather than just traffic](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [New CMO Abhishek joined Firework, will provide strategic direction on content efforts](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Team discussing ways to improve blog CTAs and pop-ups to increase playbook downloads and lead capture](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [13 new articles published last week, bringing total to 334](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Focusing on spring sale campaign topics and video-related content to promote video playbook](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Seeing growth in organic traffic and clicks, aiming for 6000 clicks/month](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [January saw 15 leads vs only 3 in February - team analyzing reasons for fluctuation](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [Initially focused on product/service topics, now targeting marketer pain points and enterprise clients](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Using lead generation data to identify successful content clusters and replicate](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Discussing ways to make content more actionable and relevant to target audience](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Exploring new topics like AI-powered video creation, UGC/influencer content, multi-brand retailer strategies](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)

### Blog Optimization Efforts

  - [Cameron working on improving blog layout, CTAs, and adding targeted pop-ups](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Team debating placement of content outline, related articles section to reduce bounce rate](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=2362.0)
  - [Discussing strategies for pop-up frequency and targeting to avoid user fatigue](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)

### AI and Video Technology Focus

  - [Highlighting Firework's AI-powered solutions like virtual assistants and video translation](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=2895.0)
  - [Planning content around AI use cases, ROI examples, and how brands can leverage the technology](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=2916.0)
  - [Exploring topics on video content creation myths, best practices, and optimization strategies](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=2866.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule deeper dive meeting with Abhishek to review content strategy and performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [Pratik to research UGC/influencer content topics and multi-brand retailer strategies](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=1965.0)
  - [Sam to set up meeting to review content strategy playbook with Pratik](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=2768.0)
  - [Cameron to test and refine blog pop-up implementation based on initial data](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=2047.0)
  - [Team to continue refining blog layout and CTA placement for optimal performance](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=2410.0)
  - [Explore creating more targeted, actionable content examples for video commerce use cases](https://fathom.video/share/7DvYVDAM_gBB9-kvs5VvDsXyNzHY3kh9?tab=summary&timestamp=2452.0)
